# Getting Started

## Snipcart for Statamic

Snipcart for Statamic makes the setup of your Snipcart shop on Statamic a breeze. Read the official [Snipcart documentation](https://docs.snipcart.com/v3/) for more information about how to set up your shop.

## Features

* Simple installation and setup
* Automatically generated product attributes
* Optimized blueprint with all the fields accepted by Snipcart

## Requirements

* Snipcart account
* Statamic 3
* PHP &gt;= 7.4
* Laravel 7

## License

Snipcart for Statamic is **commercial software** but has an open-source codebase. If you want to use it in production, you'll need to [buy a license from the Statamic Marketplace](https://statamic.com/addons/aerni/snipcart).

{% hint style="danger" %}
Snipcart for Statamic is **NOT** free software.
{% endhint %}
